ns0:entry.ns0:title: CloakHQ/CloakBrowser
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CloakHQ/CloakBrowser
Language: python
Stealth Chromium that passes every bot detection test. Drop-in Playwright replacement with source-level fingerprint patches. 30/30 tests passed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: D4Vinci/Scrapling
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/D4Vinci/Scrapling
Language: python
🕷️ An adaptive Web Scraping framework that handles everything from a single request to a full-scale crawl!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
Language: python
~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PriorLabs/TabPFN
Language: python
⚡ TabPFN: Foundation Model for Tabular Data ⚡

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bunkerity/bunkerweb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bunkerity/bunkerweb
Language: python
🛡️ Open-source and cloud-native Web Application Firewall (WAF)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bytedance/deer-flow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bytedance/deer-flow
Language: python
An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ccxt/ccxt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ccxt/ccxt
Language: python
A cryptocurrency trading API with more than 100 exchanges in JavaScript / TypeScript / Python / C# / PHP / Go

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cheahjs/free-llm-api-resources

A list of free LLM inference resources accessible via API.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cocoindex-io/cocoindex
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cocoindex-io/cocoindex
Language: python
Incremental engine for long horizon agents 🌟 Star if you like it!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/markitdown
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/markitdown
Language: python
Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: public-apis/public-apis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/public-apis/public-apis
Language: python

ns0:entry.ns0:title: raullenchai/Rapid-MLX
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/raullenchai/Rapid-MLX
Language: python
The fastest local AI engine for Apple Silicon. 4.2x faster than Ollama, 0.08s cached TTFT, 100% tool calling. 17 tool parsers, prompt cache, reasoning separation, cloud routing. Drop-in OpenAI replacement. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Aider.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sansan0/TrendRadar
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sansan0/TrendRadar
Language: python
⭐AI-driven public opinion & trend monitor with multi-platform aggregation, RSS, and smart alerts.🎯 告别信息过载，你的 AI 舆情监控助手与热点筛选工具！聚合多平台热点 + RSS 订阅，支持关键词精准筛选。AI 智能筛选新闻 + AI 翻译 + AI 分析简报直推手机，也支持接入 MCP 架构，赋能 AI 自然语言对话分析、情感洞察与趋势预测等。支持 Docker ，数据本地/云端自持。集成微信/飞书/钉钉/Telegram/邮件/ntfy/bark/slack 等渠道智能推送。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: soxoj/maigret
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/soxoj/maigret
Language: python
🕵️‍♂️ Collect a dossier on a person by username from 3000+ sites
